properties.Landslides: 1. Landslide risk - Side wall of Pahala Gibipani road
properties.Proposed Measures: Follow recommendations of NBRO. A 28 m long and 3.0 m high retaining wall should be constructed.
properties.photopath: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MWS003-GIS/MWS003-GIS.github.io/main/IWWRMP/Data/EXD/200_photo/MWS_167/IMG_20260123_131317 Kelegala - side wall of Pahala Gibipani road.jpg

properties.Proposed Measures: Follow recommendations of NBRO after consulting. Alternative lands should be provided.
